reviews.comment:
Un robo a mano armada y ni siquiera te imprimen el ticket factura. 3 U$d un agua con gas y 12 u$d un sandwich de miga…

(Translated by Google)
It's highway robbery, and they don't even print a receipt. $3 for a bottle of sparkling water and $12 for a finger sandwich…
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZLVpHNHZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un paso obligado para cargar nafta, les recomiendo las medias lunas, nada de envidiar las de Atalaya. Muy bueno el cafe para acompañarlas, luego no tiene nada mas que agregar, el control aduanero es demasiado lento con respecto a otros pasos fronterizos.

(Translated by Google)
It's a necessary stop for filling up with gas. I recommend the croissants; they're just as good as the ones in Atalaya. The coffee to go with them is excellent. There's nothing else to add, though. Customs control is far too slow compared to other border crossings.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZb01mQzB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) There are no food or snack options.

(Original)
Não tem opção de comida nem lanche.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvcmZiRWFREAE

reviews.comment:
De 10 en el desierto un lugar muy cómodo, con personal acordé al lugar y a la falta de oxígeno como estación de servicio muy limpia a dónde vayas en especial el baño.

(Translated by Google)
10 out of 10 in the desert, a very comfortable place, with staff I agreed with the place and the lack of oxygen as a very clean service station wherever you go, especially the bathroom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvMnJxWEZnEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I filled up twice. The first time, the attendant was very insistent on putting in a fuel I didn't want and couldn't put in my vehicle (500 diesel vs. infinite diesel). The second time, even after the tank was full, he continued filling it until it overflowed. They also make no effort to communicate with those who don't speak the country's language well (it seems they make a point of speaking quickly).

(Original)
Abasteci duas vezes, na primeira o frentista foi muito insistente para colocar combustível que eu não queria e não podia colocar no meu veículo (diesel 500 x diesel infinita). Já na segunda, mesmo após o tanque cheio, continuou  abastecendo até vazar. Também não se esforçam em nada para se comunicar com quem não fala bem a língua do país (parece que fazem questão de falar rápido)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvZ3JmaFB3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) It seems like bad temper and laziness are prerequisites for working at this gas station... It's as if they're doing the tourists a favor... Not to mention they fill up the tank and let the fuel leak as if it weren't important... I think it's only open because it's the only one in the area... When another brand opens a station and provides good service, this one will go bankrupt...

(Original)
Parece que o mau humor e a preguiça de atender é pré-requisito para trabalhar nesse posto...  Até parece que estão fazendo favor pra os turistas... Sem contar que abastecem e deixam vazar o combustível como se não fosse importante... Acho que só está aberto pq é o único do lugar...  Quando outra bandeira abrir um posto e fazer um bom atendimento vai falir o mesmo...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvZ3QzdE5REAE

reviews.comment:
El playero que se encontraba el 20/04 en el turno mañana no tenía ni ganas de trabajar no quiso limpiarnos el parabrisas diciendo que el agua salía congelada (mentira) y por si fuera poco nunca me devolvió la tarjeta de débito ni el Dni!!😡😡

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant who was there on April 20th on the morning shift didn't even feel like working, he didn't want to clean our windshield saying that the water was freezing (a lie) and to top it all off he never gave me back my debit card or my ID!! 😡😡
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvckxmVlN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, baños limpios. Última estación de servicio antes de cruzar a Chile

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean restrooms. Last gas station before crossing into Chile
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJdmVhNTFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Border crossing with friendly service. The border guards were smiling and helpful!

(Original)
Przejście graniczne z miłą obsługa
Panowie graniczni uśmiechnięci i pomocni !

Excelente atendimento. Ótima opção de motel próxima a fronteira. Quartos confortaveis

reviews.comment:
Tiene lo básico en desayuno. Los empleados casi ni responden cuando le hablas, son parcos. El lugar tiene montañas que dan lugar a muchas bellezas.

(Translated by Google)
It has the basics for breakfast. The staff barely respond when you speak to them; they're very curt. The area has mountains that offer many beautiful views.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRNDhuU2VBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es la gloria después de pasar por las estaciones de servicio chilenas!!
Una buena lagrima con medias lunas ,son todo lo que necesitas para seguir viaje!! Jaja

(Translated by Google)
It's heaven after passing through Chilean gas stations!!
A good teardrop with crescent moons is all you need to keep going!! Haha
